rationale: The citing paper references Gneezy et al. (2014) only in a grouped list of prior findings that consumers infer quality from price. It is used as general background for attribute-inference literature in the discussion/theoretical implications section, not as a direct basis for hypotheses, mechanism development, measures, or empirical design. The core argument in the citing paper centers on legality -> accessibility -> perceived strength, with no distinct functional dependence on the cited paper's reference-dependent price-quality model.
